Title: OGLE-2016-BLG-1003: First Resolved Caustic-crossing Binary-source 
       Event Discovered by Second-generation Microlensing Surveys  
Authors: Jung Y.K., Udalski A., Bond I.A., Yee J.C., Gould A., Han C., 
         Albrow M.D., Lee C.-U., Kim S.-L., Hwang K.-H., Chung S.-J., Ryu Y.-H.,
         Shin I.-G., Zhu W., Cha S.-M., Kim D.-J., Lee Y., Park B.-G., 
         Kim H.-W., Pogge R.W., Skowron J., Szymanski M.K., Poleski R., Mroz P.,
         Kozlowski S., Pietrukowicz P., Soszynski I., Ulaczyk K., Pawlak M., 
         Abe F., Bennett D.P., Barry R., Sumi T., Asakura Y., Bhattacharya A., 
         Donachie M., Fukui A., Hirao Y., Itow Y., Koshimoto N., Li M.C.A., 
         Ling C.H., Masuda K., Matsubara Y., Muraki Y., Nagakane M., 
         Rattenbury N.J., Evans P., Sharan A., Sullivan D.J., Suzuki D., 
         Tristram P.J., Yamada T., Yamada T., Yonehara A.
Figure: Light curve of OGLE-2016-BLG-1003
================================================================================
Byte-by-byte Description of file: dbf1.txt
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   Bytes Format Units   Label   Explanations
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
   1-  4 A4     ---     Obs     Observatory identifier
   6-  6 A1     ---     Filter  Filter used
   8- 18 F11.6  d       HJD     Heliocentric Julian Date; - 2450000
  20- 28 F9.6   mag     mag     Apparent magnitude in Filter
  30- 37 F8.6   mag   e_mag     Uncertainty in mag
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
